news.headline: SCOTUS: FEDERAL RESERVE IS A UNIQUELY STRUCTURED, QUASI-PRIVATE ENTITY
SCOTUS SHIELDS FED AS IT LETS TRUMP OUST AGENCY LEADERS

news.summary: In San Antonio, Liquid Networx, a top cybersecurity and managed services provider, revealed they have been honored with the title of Fortinet’s Unified SASE Partner of the Year. The accolade is part of Fortinet Partner of the Year Awards program which celebrates outstanding partners and distributors globally. Fortinet relies heavily on its channel partners to ensure the security of users, devices, applications, and networks worldwide. Liquid Networx's recognition as the Unified SASE Partner of the Year signifies their exceptional contribution in this realm.
news.headline: Liquid Networx, a cybersecurity firm, wins Fortinet’s Unified SASE Partner of the Year Award. Recognizing distinguished partners, the award showcases key contributions in securing users, with global recognition.

news.summary: Menlo Park-based Cal Redwood Acquisition Corp. has disclosed the pricing of its initial public offering, which includes 20,000,000 units valued at $10.00 per unit as of May 22, 2025. The units will trade on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol “CRAQU” starting from May 23, 2025. Each unit will comprise one Class A ordinary share and one right entitling the holder to one tenth of a Class A ordinary share following the completion of an initial business combination. Post the commencement of separate trading of the securities within the units, the Company anticipates its Class A ordinary shares and rights to be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbols “CRA” and “CRAQR,” respectively. The public offering is set to conclude on May 27, 2025, pending customary closing conditions.
news.headline: Cal Redwood Acquisition Corp. is pricing its $200 million initial public offering with 20 million units at $10/unit, to be listed on Nasdaq under ticker "CRAQU" on May 23, 2025, for trading.
Trump received gifts during a dinner, details undisclosed.

news.summary: Expert neuroscientist in drug development has recently joined to assist in the strategic advancement of long-lasting central nervous system (CNS) treatments. This move aims to leverage their expertise in the field to enhance the development of drugs that target brain disorders. This strategic partnership brings together significant experience in neuroscience and pharmaceuticals to drive innovation and progress in the creation of long-acting CNS therapeutics. The collaboration signals a strong commitment to addressing neurological conditions with a focus on developing effective treatments for patients.
news.headline: Serina Therapeutics appoints Stephen Brannan, M.D. to board of directors, focusing on long-acting CNS therapeutics.

news.summary: A company based in Cincinnati, OH, Onconetix, Inc. (Nasdaq: ONCO), recently disclosed that it was issued a Staff delisting letter by The Nasdaq Capital Market on May 20, 2025. The letter highlighted that Onconetix failed to submit its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending March 31, 2025, putting it in breach of Nasdaq's listing standards as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). This notification indicates potential consequences for the company's listing status on the Nasdaq stock exchange.
news.headline: Onconetix, Inc. got a delisting warning from Nasdaq on May 20, 2025 for not filing Q1 report; violates Rule 5250(c)(1).

news.summary: A groundbreaking technology company known as Cosmic Wire, specializing in blockchain memory, compression, and spatial web infrastructure, has recently formed a strategic alliance with Sovereign Wealth Management Pte Ltd. (SWM), a prominent strategy firm and capital syndicate. This partnership aims to expedite the advancement and implementation of decentralized infrastructure worldwide, spanning various sectors such as finance and digital identity. Through leveraging blockchain memory technology and volumetric data, the collaboration seeks to revolutionize global systems.
news.headline: Cosmic Wire partners with Sovereign Wealth Management for decentralized infrastructure development, reshaping blockchain and spatial web.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, the Board of Directors of First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share of common stock. Michael C. Frederick, the President and Chief Executive Officer, confirmed this news. The dividend is set to be paid on June 27, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as of June 13, 2025.
news.headline: First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) declares $0.29 quarterly cash dividend; Payment on June 27, 2025 to shareholders of record by June 13, 2025.
SUPREME COURT SAYS AGENCY LEADER RULING DOESN'T APPLY TO FED

news.summary: Walmart Inc. has revealed intentions to slash around 1,500 corporate jobs in efforts to enhance decision-making efficiency and reduce costs. The restructuring strategy by the largest private employer in the U.S. aims to streamline operations and promote innovation, affecting teams within the global tech and Walmart U.S. departments. The employees were informed through a memo from Walmart U.S. CEO John Furner and global chief technology officer Suresh Kumar, citing the fast-paced evolution of technology as a primary driver of the organizational adjustments. This move is part of a broader initiative to adapt to the rapidly changing tech landscape.
news.headline: Walmart to cut 1,500 jobs to streamline operations amid tariffs, aims to improve efficiency through restructuring.

news.summary: Goldman Sachs has identified L3Harris Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: LHX) as a potential major beneficiary of the Trump administration's $175 billion "Golden Dome" project. Analyst Noah Poponak from Goldman Sachs reaffirmed a Buy rating on L3Harris after discussions with management, underscoring the company's strong positioning within the initiative. Announced on May 20 by President Donald Trump, along with Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth and military leaders, the Golden Dome aims to establish a sophisticated national missile defense system capable of countering hypersonic and ballistic missiles. The program is slated for completion in approximately three years, but its complexity may cause delays, according to experts. Apart from missile defense, L3Harris is excelling in high-margin communications and signal processing technologies. The company's management highlighted increasing global interest in battlefield integration systems. For more details, please refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs picks L3Harris (NASDAQ: LHX) to benefit from Trump's $175B defense initiative for national missile defense system.
U.S. SUPREME COURT LETS TRUMP KEEP DEMOCRATIC MEMBERS OF LABOR BOARDS SIDELINED WHILE LITIGATION OVER THE FIRINGS PROCEEDS
SUPREME COURT BACKS TRUMP'S OUSTER OF AGENCY LEADERS FOR NOW

news.summary: Intuit Inc (NASDAQ: INTU) released its fiscal third-quarter financial results for 2025 after the market closed on Thursday. The company exceeded analyst expectations with third-quarter revenue reaching $7.75 billion compared to the anticipated $7.56 billion. Adjusted earnings for the quarter were reported at $11.65 per share, surpassing the estimated $10.91 per share. Total revenue saw a 15% increase year-over-year. Revenue breakdown by segment includes: Consumer Group at $4 billion (up 11%), Global Business Solutions at $2.8 billion (up 19%), Credit Karma at $579 million (up 31%), ProTax Group at $278 million (up 9%), and Online Ecosystem revenue up by 20%. Intuit also engaged in repurchasing activities during this period. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Intuit's Q3 earnings beat estimates with revenue of $7.75B and EPS of $11.65. Revenue up 15% YoY with strong growth across platforms.

news.summary: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) posted its first-quarter results following Thursday's market close. The report revealed earnings of $2.29 per share, surpassing the estimated $2.15. The company generated a quarterly revenue of $1.63 billion, exceeding the anticipated $1.61 billion and marking an increase from the previous year's $1.42 billion in revenue. The positive outcome comes amidst challenging geopolitical, macroeconomic, and policy conditions. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Autodesk's Q1 earnings beat estimates at $2.29/share, revenue hit $1.63B, up from $1.42B last year. Stock rises.

news.summary: As discussions surrounding the president's second term intensify, Democrats are focusing more on his personal cryptocurrency transactions for scrutiny.
news.headline: Senators criticize Trump's crypto dinner, demanding details on guests. Dems target private dealings to scrutinize his next term.

news.summary: In Watsonville, California, Granite (NYSE:GVA) has secured a contract worth around $26 million from the San Francisco International Airport (SFO) to enhance Taxiway Z and a section of Taxiway S in San Francisco. The project will be funded by SFO and is set to be part of Granite's second-quarter CAP. The aim of the project is to refurbish the taxiways, ensuring the ongoing safety and effectiveness of aircraft operations. Taxiway Z is a crucial pathway for aircraft at the airport.
news.headline: Granite to renovate Taxiway Z and portion of Taxiway S at SFO with $26 million contract. Safeguarding aircraft operations.

news.summary: In Englewood, Colorado, Liberty Broadband has announced the declaration of a quarterly cash dividend for its Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. The company has also appointed Derek Chang to its Board of Directors. This move reflects Liberty Broadband's commitment to shareholder value and corporate governance.
news.headline: Liberty Broadband declares cash dividend on Series A preferred stock and appoints Derek Chang to board.

news.summary: Xerox, based in Norwalk, Connecticut, has adjusted its dividend policy as part of preparations for the completion of the Lexmark transaction. The new quarterly dividend stands at $0.025 per share, which amounts to $0.10 per share annually. Xerox's Board of Directors approved this change and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.025 per share for Xerox Holdings Corporation Common Stock. Shareholders as of June 30, 2025, will receive this dividend on July 31, 2025. This update was announced in December 20.
news.headline: Xerox slashes quarterly dividend to $0.025 per share ($0.10 annualized) ahead of Lexmark acquisition.

news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc., a prominent global technology and data provider (NYSE: ICE), disclosed that Lynn Martin, NYSE President and ICE Fixed Income and Data Services Chair, is scheduled to speak at the Piper Sandler Global Exchange and Trading Conference. The presentation is set for Thursday, June 5 at 10:30 a.m. ET. Access to the live and replay webcast of the presentation will be available in the investor relations and media section of the company's website.
news.headline: NYSE President and ICE Fixed Income and Data Services Chair Lynn Martin to present at the Piper Sandler Global Exchange and Trading Conference on June 5 at 10:30 a.m. ET. Webcast available.

news.summary: The University of Phoenix College of Doctoral Studies has recently launched the Phoenix AI Research Group through the Center for Educational and Instructional Technology Research (CEITR). The group is focused on exploring the applications of Artificial Intelligence (AI) within the education sector, with a specific emphasis on supporting higher education. The aim is to enhance the utilization of AI in education by understanding its impact and addressing challenges. This initiative seeks to drive innovation and provide strategies for implementing AI effectively.
news.headline: University of Phoenix creates Phoenix AI Research Group to advance AI in education, part of CEITR. Aims at understanding AI's impact.

news.summary: Elastic, identified as ESTC on the New York Stock Exchange, a prominent Search AI Company, released details about upcoming conference presentations by its management. They are set to speak at two key events - Bank of America Global Technology Conference on June 4, 2025, at 1:20 p.m. PT / 4:20 p.m. ET and Rosenblatt Technology Summit on June 11, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. PT / 3:00 p.m. ET. Both conferences will have a live webcast and offer replays accessible through Elastic’s Investor Relations webpage at ir.elastic.co. Elastic is a publicly traded company on NYSE under the ticker symbol ESTC, specializing in Search AI technology.
news.headline: Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) to present at Bank of America Global Technology Conference on June 4, 2025, and Rosenblatt Technology Summit on June 11, 2025. Live webcast available.

news.summary: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company and part of the Iberdrola Group, recently revealed plans for five projects in Ithaca, NY. These initiatives represent a significant investment of $41 million aimed at enhancing the capacity and dependability of the local electrical grid. The focus on Ithaca is part of Avangrid's broader strategy to upgrade New York's energy infrastructure. Since the launch of the 2023 Reliable Energy Rate Plan, Avangrid has allocated over $500 million towards 265 projects across the state.
news.headline: Avangrid invests $41M in NY grid, $500M total in 265 projects since 2023, improving capacity and reliability.

news.summary: In Mayfield Heights, Ohio, Materion Corporation (NYSE: MTRN) revealed the appointment of Melissa Fashinpaur as chief accounting officer starting June 1, 2025. Ms. Fashinpaur's new position involves overseeing all accounting functions, guaranteeing the accuracy of internal and external financial reports, creating and executing global accounting policies, and maintaining strong internal controls.
news.headline: Materion Corp appoints Melissa Fashinpaur as Chief Accounting Officer effective June 1, 2025. #MTRN

news.summary: In Davenport, Iowa, the Iowa Utilities Commission (IUC) recently approved new water and wastewater rates for Iowa American Water on May 21. The company filed for rate changes on May 1, 2024, citing over $157 million in infrastructure upgrades for treatment and distribution systems as the main reason. Brad Ni, a representative from the company, stated that the investments were crucial to ensure the provision of safe, clean, reliable, and affordable services to customers.
news.headline: Iowa American Water granted new rates by IUC; requests approved with $157M infrastructure investment cited.

news.summary: Ecolab Inc. is set to hold its 2025 Investor Day on September 4th in Eagan, MN, beginning at 8:00 a.m. (CT). Christophe Beck, the chairman and CEO, alongside Scott Kirkland, the CFO, and other senior leaders, will delve into the company's strategic plan, growth catalysts, and financial goals. The agenda includes detailed presentations, Q&A segments, a leadership luncheon, and interactive sessions. This event offers investors insights into Ecolab's future direction and targets.
news.headline: Ecolab to hold 2025 Investor Day on September 4 with CEO Christophe Beck & CFO Scott Kirkland.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, e.l.f. Beauty revealed that their Chairman and CEO, Tarang Amin, is set to engage in a fireside chat at Deutsche Bank’s dbAccess Global Consumer Conference in Paris on June 5, 2025, at 9:15am CEST (3:15am ET). The discussion can be viewed live at https://investor.elfbeauty.com/stock-and-financial/events-and-presentations. An archived version will be accessible for those who miss the live broadcast. The company is listed on the NYSE under the symbol ELF.
news.headline: e.l.f. Beauty's CEO to speak at Deutsche Bank's Global Consumer Conference in Paris on June 5, 2025 at 9:15am CEST. Webcast available live.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has reached 4.2%, an increase from the previous month. This amounts to a total of 6.7 million people without jobs as of the latest data. Additionally, the inflation rate has also seen a rise to 2.5%, causing concerns among experts. On a positive note, the GDP growth rate for the quarter stands at 3.8%, showcasing a steady improvement in the economy. These figures indicate a mixed outlook for the country's financial landscape, with both challenges and advancements on the horizon.
news.headline: Helena Helmersson named to Board of Directors.
Biodexa Pharmaceuticals PLC announces upcoming General Meeting.

news.summary: Interpublic Group (NYSE: IPG) based in New York, NY, has revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend for IPG common stock amounting to $0.33 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid out on June 16, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the market's closing on June 2, 2025.
news.headline: Interpublic Group declares $0.33 quarterly dividend on common stock, payable June 16, 2025 to holders.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Bio-Path Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB:BPTH), a biotech company utilizing DNAbilize® antisense RNAi nanoparticle tech for cancer and obesity drug development, revealed plans for a live conference call and webcast on May 29, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. This event aims to offer a detailed business summary to stakeholders.
news.headline: Bio-Path Holdings to host corporate update call on May 29, 2025 at 8:30 am ET regarding its RNAi nanoparticle tech.

news.summary: On May 19, 2025, Crown LNG Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: CGBS) based in London, received a letter from The NASDAQ Stock Market LLC notifying them of non-compliance with NASDAQ Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). The letter stated that the company had not timely filed its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the period ended December 31, 2024, with the Securities and Exchange Commission. This violation arose due to the requirement of timely submission of all necessary financial reports with the SEC.
news.headline: Crown LNG Holdings Limited gets NASDAQ notice on failure to file Annual Report. Compliance issue with NASDAQ Listing Rule 5250(c)(1).

news.summary: Today, Red River Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: RRBI) announced in Alexandria, Louisiana, that on May 22, 2025, it reached an agreement with a shareholder for the repurchase of 100,000 shares of its common stock. The transaction, done privately, totaled $5.1 million, at a discount compared to the average prices over 10, 20, and 30 days leading to May 20, 2025. The President and CEO, Blake Chatelain, expressed satisfaction with the repurchase, highlighting the Company's dedication to enhancing shareholder value.
news.headline: Red River Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: RRBI) repurchased 100,000 shares at $5.1 million, reflecting a discount to recent prices.

news.summary: Medallion Bank, an FDIC-insured bank specializing in consumer loans for recreational vehicles, boats, and home improvements, as well as loan origination services for fintech partners, recently completed a public offering. The offering comprised 3,100,000 shares of its Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series G, valued at $1.00 per share, with a liquidation amount of $25 per share. The total liquidation amount reached $77.5 million, including the underwriters’ partial exercise of an option to purchase an additional 100,000 shares. The offering was priced on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Medallion Bank closed Series G Preferred Stock offering with 3.1M shares at $25 per share, totaling $77.5M.

news.summary: Athene Holding Ltd. in West Des Moines, Iowa, revealed the declaration of preferred stock dividends on its non-cumulative preferred stock. These dividends are payable on June 30, 2025, to shareholders of record on June 15, 2025. Each depositary share represents a 1/1,000th interest in a share of preferred stock.
news.headline: Athene Holding Ltd. declares Q2 2025 preferred stock dividends for depositary shares, payable June 30 to holders as of June 15.

news.summary: Today, Red River Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: RRBI) disclosed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share of common stock. This dividend will be distributed on June 18, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 6, 2025.
news.headline: Red River Bancshares, Inc. declares $0.12/share quarterly cash dividend, payable to shareholders on June 18, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the national unemployment rate has dropped by 0.5% to a record low of 3.7%. This positive trend indicates a significant decrease in the number of unemployed individuals in the country. The month of November saw an impressive addition of 250,000 new jobs, exceeding economists' expectations. The labor force participation rate also increased to 63.4%, reflecting more individuals actively seeking employment opportunities. These latest figures point towards a robust and growing economy, with various sectors witnessing job growth and improved prospects for workers. The decrease in the unemployment rate and the rise in job creation are indicative of a thriving labor market and overall economic stability.
news.headline: Record high Bitcoin options open interest reached, with traders eyeing $116K target.

news.summary: In Brampton, Ontario, DATA Communications Management Corp. ("DCM") disclosed that their annual shareholder meeting took place on May 22, 2025, in Toronto, Ontario. A total of 29 shareholders, with 30,838,490 common shares of the Corporation ("Common Shares"), were present at the Meeting either physically or by proxy, accounting for about 55.76% of the overall votes attached to all issues.
news.headline: DCM reports results of Annual Shareholders Meeting on May 22, 2025. 29 shareholders represented 30,838,490 common shares, 55.76% of total votes.

news.summary: The newest Claude models by Anthropic offer enhanced coding capabilities and advanced reasoning skills, catering to enthusiasts looking to engage in coding marathons. However, these models come at a premium cost.
news.headline: Anthropic's Claude 4 dominates AI competitors and wallets with high costs for coding marathons and superior reasoning.
RODRIGUEZ ALSO CHARGED WITH MURDER OF FOREIGN OFFICIALS, CAUSING DEATH WITH A FIREARM AND DISCHARGING A FIREARM IN A CRIME OF VIOLENCE -COURT FILING
US CHARGES WASHINGTON SHOOTING SUSPECT ELIAS RODRIGUEZ WITH FIRST DEGREE MURDER -COURT FILING

news.summary: Software company Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) announced its first-quarter results, exceeding expectations. The earnings for the quarter stood at $2.23 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $2.01 by 10.95%. Additionally, quarterly revenue reached $2.24 billion, higher than the Street estimate of $2.22 billion. Furthermore, the subscription revenues were reported at $2.059 billion. This strong financial performance indicates a positive start to the fiscal year for Workday.
news.headline: Workday (WDAY) shares fall as Q1 earnings beat estimate at $2.23/share, but Q2 revenue forecast of $2.24B misses expectations.

news.summary: In Fremont, California, Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX) recently held its 2025 Investor and Analyst Event, where it revealed its strategic plan to seize upcoming growth opportunities, enhance profitability, and create lasting value for customers and shareholders. The company emphasized that rapid data expansion, propelled by technological advancements and AI, is stimulating the demand for hard drive storage solutions. Seagate emphasized its unique position within the industry to capitalize on this trend.
news.headline: Seagate Technology focuses on long-term value in data world, plans for growth at 2025 event. Positioning for data growth.

news.summary: Tysons, Virginia - Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) has successfully completed the sale of the 316-room Hyatt Centric Fisherman’s Wharf in San Francisco, California for $80 million, equivalent to $253,000 per room. This sale price reflects a multiple of 64.0x of the hotel's 2024 EBITDA. The proceeds from this transaction will be directed towards continuous return on investment initiatives within Park's portfolio and for general corporate uses. Despite facing a difficult transaction environment, the company is pleased with the outcome.
news.headline: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. sells Hyatt Centric Fisherman’s Wharf in San Francisco for $80 million, or $253,000/key.

news.summary: Houston-based Comfort Systems USA, Inc. (NYSE: FIX) recently announced a revision to their stock repurchase program. The Board of Directors approved an increase in authorized shares available for repurchase, bringing the total to 1,000,000 shares. Comfort Systems USA is a prominent provider of heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and electrical contracting services for commercial, industrial, and institutional clients. This decision reflects the company's commitment to leveraging opportunities for stock repurchases to enhance shareholder value.
news.headline: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) boosts stock repurchase program, allowing purchase of up to 1,000,000 shares.

news.summary: The Board of Directors of Eagle Materials Inc. (NYSE: EXP) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share. This dividend will be paid on July 14, 2025, to shareholders of record of its Common Stock as of June 16, 2025. Eagle Materials Inc. is a major U.S. producer of heavy construction products and light building materials. The company's primary products include Portland Cement and Gypsum Wallboard, crucial in the construction and expansion industries.
news.headline: Eagle Materials Inc. (NYSE: EXP) declares a $0.25 quarterly cash dividend, payable on July 14, 2025, to shareholders of record by June 16, 2025.

news.summary: In Livermore, California, leading companies Topcon Positioning Systems and Amberg Technologies Ltd. have announced a strategic partnership to enhance compatibility between Topcon’s sensor solutions and Amberg Technologies’ software/hardware platforms for rail and tunnel uses. This collaboration aims to provide seamless integrated solutions for mutual customers. Topcon Positioning Systems is a renowned manufacturer and distributor of industry-leading sensor technology. This partnership signifies a significant milestone in offering comprehensive solutions tailored for rail and tunnel applications.
news.headline: Topcon Positioning Systems and Amberg Technologies collaborate for rail and tunnel applications, offering integrated solutions to customers.

news.summary: In Latham, New York, Protective Industrial Products, Inc. (PIP®) has finalized the acquisition of Honeywell's Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) Business, as announced today. This transaction includes prominent brands like Fendall™, Fibre-Metal™, Howard Leight™, KCL™, Miller™, Morning Pride™, North™, Oliver™, Salisbury™, among others. PIP is under the ownership of Odyssey Investment Partners, LLC. This merger forms a top-tier collection of industrial protection products globally.
news.headline: Protective Industrial Products acquires Honeywell's PPE business, includes brands like Fendall, North. Partnered with Odyssey Investment.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.5% in 2021, following a contraction of 3.5% in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The recovery is expected to be uneven across countries, with advanced economies expanding by 5.6% while emerging market and developing economies are forecasted to grow by 6.3%. Inflation is also anticipated to rise in advanced economies to 2.4% and in emerging markets to 4.9%. Additionally, global trade volume is expected to increase by 8.4% after a decline of 9.9% in the previous year. These projections highlight the ongoing impacts of the pandemic on the world economy and the varying speeds of recovery among nations.
news.headline: Inventus Mining completes $1M flow-through private placement with investor Eric Sprott.
